LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT THOMAS GUEVARA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND RECALL WRIT OF EXECUTION IS GRANTED. Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. KAVITA SHARMA OF GOLDSTEIN & GELMAN & HARRIS, TEL. NO. 673-5600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. AARON MORRISON, TEL. NO. 956-0549 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT THOMAS GUEVARA'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution, MOTION IS GRANTED. THERE IS A CONFLICT IN THE DECLARATIONS OF DEFENDANT AND HESTER ON THE ONE SIDE, AND THE PROCESS SERVER ON THE OTHER. DOUBT WITH RESPECT TO SETTING ASIDE A DEFAULT SHOULD BE RESOLVED IN FAVOR OF THE APPLICANT, 162, CA 2ND 594. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: John K.
